response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocal performance of 'XY&Z' perfectly matches the provided reference lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON was fully utilized for the song lyrics; manual transcription was performed for the pixel-art intro's visual text cards and the post-performance talk segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are anchored precisely to vocal onsets and visual text appearances. Applied aggressive truncation during the fast-paced song chorus and instantaneous transitions for the talk segment to ensure synchronization and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: こよりは マヨネーズで 回復した
subtitles.english: [Koyori recovered with mayonnaise]

subtitles.original: 助手くんが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: [Assistant-kun joined the party!]

subtitles.original: AIこよりが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: [AI Koyori joined the party!]

subtitles.original: もふこよが仲間になった！
subtitles.english: [Mofukoyo joined the party!]

subtitles.original: へい! カロスを照らすあの朝日のように
subtitles.english: Hey! Like the morning sun shining on Kalos,

subtitles.original: (ニトロチャージ熱く行こうぜ)
subtitles.english: (Let's go with a hot nitro charge!)

subtitles.original: さあ! 進もうぜ いつでも準備はOK
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's move forward, we're always ready!

subtitles.original: (かたやぶりへんげんじざいで)
subtitles.english: (With our unconventional, ever-changing style!)

subtitles.original: 重なり合う想いがシンクロして
subtitles.english: With our overlapping feelings synchronized,

subtitles.original: 決して消えない絆になるから
subtitles.english: It becomes a bond that will never fade away.

subtitles.original: どこまでも強くなれる
subtitles.english: Because we can become stronger forever,

subtitles.original: 俺たちならwoh woh woh yeah
subtitles.english: If it's us, woh woh woh yeah!

subtitles.original: いくZ!! 激しく燃えるバトル
subtitles.english: Go!! A fierce and burning battle,

subtitles.original: いくZ!! ピンチはチャンスだぜ
subtitles.english: Go!! A crisis is an opportunity,

subtitles.original: いこうZ!! きしかいせい
subtitles.english: Go!! A comeback!

subtitles.original: 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: We will never give up,

subtitles.original: 俺たちは諦めない
subtitles.english: We will never give up!

subtitles.original: へい! 例えどんな壁が道を塞いだって
subtitles.english: Hey! No matter what wall is blocking our path,

subtitles.original: (いつでも当たって砕けろで)
subtitles.english: (Always hit it and break it!)

subtitles.original: さあ! この手でしょうりのほしを掴むんだ
subtitles.english: Come on! Grab the star of victory with these hands,

subtitles.original: (折れないふくつのこころで)
subtitles.english: (With an unyielding heart.)

subtitles.original: 俺たちはいつでもどんな時も
subtitles.english: Because we are always connected

subtitles.original: 同じ心で繋がってるから
subtitles.english: by the same heart at all times,

subtitles.original: 何度でも立ち上がるぜ
subtitles.english: I can stand up again and again,

subtitles.original: お前となら
subtitles.english: if I'm with you.

subtitles.original: いくZ!! 手強いライバルたち
subtitles.english: Go!! Formidable rivals,

subtitles.original: いくZ!! 決めろいちげきひっさつ!
subtitles.english: Go!! Decide with one blow, sure kill!

subtitles.original: いこうZ!! 負けられない
subtitles.english: Go!! We can't lose,

subtitles.original: 思いがここにあるから
subtitles.english: because the determination is here,

subtitles.original: 夢がおれにはあるから
subtitles.english: because I have a dream.

subtitles.original: 博衣こよみ生誕ライブ2026見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to the Haku Koyori Birthday Live 2026!

subtitles.original: 神ゲーたちの神ゲームソングをいっぱい詰め込んでるの。
subtitles.english: I've packed in lots of great songs from great games.

subtitles.original: 最後まで楽しんでいってね！
subtitles.english: Please enjoy until the very end!

subtitles.original: いくZ!! 勝ちも負ける痛みも
subtitles.english: Go!! The pain of winning and losing,

subtitles.original: いくZ!! なんでも分け合える
subtitles.english: Go!! We can share anything,

subtitles.original: いこうZ!! 仲間がいる
subtitles.english: Go!! We have friends,

subtitles.original: 俺たちは一人じゃない!
subtitles.english: we are not alone!

subtitles.original: いくZ!! 激しく燃えるバトル
subtitles.english: Go!! A fierce and burning battle,

subtitles.original: いくZ!! ピンチはチャンスだぜ
subtitles.english: Go!! A crisis is an opportunity,

subtitles.original: いこうZ!! きしかいせい
subtitles.english: Go!! A comeback,

subtitles.original: 絶対に諦めない
subtitles.english: never give up!

subtitles.original: いくZ!! 譲れない夢がある
subtitles.english: Go!! I have a dream I won't give up,

subtitles.original: いくZ!! 必ずゲットだぜ
subtitles.english: Go!! I'll definitely get it,

subtitles.original: いこうZ!! 手を伸ばして
subtitles.english: Go!! Reach out,

subtitles.original: いつか描いた未来へ
subtitles.english: to the future I once imagined,

subtitles.original: 誰も知らない高みへ
subtitles.english: to heights no one knows.

subtitles.original: さあ! 上げてくぜ(100万ボルト)
subtitles.english: Come on! Let's raise it (a million volts!)

subtitles.original: そう! 立ち向かって共に行こうぜ
subtitles.english: Yes! Let's stand up and go together,

subtitles.original: 見たことのない夢の向こうまで
subtitles.english: to the other side of our dreams that we've never seen before.

subtitles.original: はーい！みんな、こんこよ！
subtitles.english: Hi, everyone! Kon-koyo!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ6期生、秘密結社holoXの頭脳、博衣こよりだよ！
subtitles.english: I'm Haku Koyori, the brains of Secret Society holoX from hololive 6th generation!

subtitles.original: 改めて今日は、博衣こより生誕ライブ2026にお越しいただきありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Once again, thank you so much for coming to the Haku Koyori Birthday Live 2026 today!

subtitles.original: コメントもいっぱいありがとう！イェイ！
subtitles.english: Thank you for all the comments too! Yay!

subtitles.original: 「カッコいい」？見えてるよ、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: "Cool"? I can see that, thank you!

subtitles.original: ということで、ライブの感想やスクショは...
subtitles.english: So, please post your impressions and screenshots of the live...

subtitles.original: #博衣こよみ生誕ライブ2026 をつけてたくさん呟いてね！
subtitles.english: using the hashtag #HakuKoyoriBirthdayLive2026!
